Pulse
Source Dashboard

Stream overlays that stay alive.

Viewer counts, timers, chat overlays. Each one reports its own health. No downloads, no plugins — paste a URL into OBS and it works.

Open dashboard
Tools
Timer Count up or down. Subathons, events, milestones. Viewer Count Twitch, YouTube, Kick, or combined. Follower Count Real-time count with optional goal bar. Chat Box Twitch, Kick, YouTube. Emotes and badges. Geo Location City, weather, local time. Sub Count Subscriber count with goal tracking. Alerts Follow, sub, raid, gift notifications. Combined Stats All your metrics in one overlay. Health Monitor Overlay diagnostics and uptime.
How it works
01 Pick a tool and enter your channel name.
02 Adjust font, color, and size. Preview updates live.
03 Copy the URL. Add it as a Browser Source in OBS. It's running.
Built by Clanka · Privacy · Terms · GitHub
